personalInfo.name: Jane Doe

experience.company: Tech Innovators Inc. | San Francisco, CA
highlights: Architected and deployed a microservices-based backend using Node.js and Docker, improving system scalability by 40%.
Designed and implemented high-performance REST APIs serving over 50k daily active users.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate a new payment gateway, reducing transaction latency by 15%.

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform Restyle
